name: 365 Golf Riverton
about: 365 Golf Riverton offers a premium indoor golf experience with 24/7 access to its state-of-the-art facilities. The venue utilizes industry-standard TrackMan 4 launch monitor technology, the same system used on the PGA Tour, ensuring accurate shot tracking and data analysis for both full swings and putting. Memberships are offered with varying access levels to guarantee ample opportunity for booking private golf time, while non-members can book tee times or schedule free tours and demonstrations to experience the technology firsthand.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to professional-grade TrackMan 4 technology for precise shot and swing data
24/7 availability with virtual keycard access to both locations
Limited membership numbers ensuring reliable booking for members
Variety of membership tiers to suit different playing needs and schedules

food_and_drink.notes: Food service available for private events
Alcohol service available for private events

simulator_hardware.notes: PGA Tour-level launch monitor for ball and club tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own golf clubs to use with the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink are not typically permitted, but food and alcohol service is available for private events.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes depends on simulator availability and group size but is generally estimated to take about 2-3 hours.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, 365 Golf is family-friendly and welcomes golfers of all ages, including children.
